text_excerpt:
EXAMINATION:  ABDOMEN (SUPINE ONLY)

INDICATION:  Percutaneous lithotripsy

TECHNIQUE:  Serial fluoroscopic images were obtained during percutaneous
lithotripsy

COMPARISON:  None

FINDINGS: 

85 intraoperative images were acquired without a radiologist present. 
Cumulative dose of 18.81 mGy.

Images show placement of guide wires and catheter, with nephrogram during
percutaneous lithotripsy.

IMPRESSION: 

Intraoperative images were obtained during percutaneous lithotripsy.  Please
refer to the operative note for details of the procedure.
